item.name: Snapping Koban
item.description:
This wavekin's golden fins and mouth appear as coins floating in the ocean, giving the impression that sailors of the Kugane coast are quite cavalier with their finances.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Spectral currents make the blue skin of this wavekin almost transparent, causing its yellow fins and mouth to appear as coins floating just under the ocean's surface. Many a greedy sailor has fallen overboard after reaching out a little too far over the bulwark.
